1532112112212211121111121112222122222121.content:
"We are really sorry." Brandi calms down. "If we could do something for you."

"It's not your fault." Mary responds. "As far as I know, we are all guilty for this situation."

"Well." Zach looks bothered. "I guess we are starting with you two." He points the ray at Hannah and Henry and shoots them.

And just how this series of events started, the siblings were the first ones to recover their sizes.

"We're back!" Henry celebrates.

"Totally, little brother." Hannah hugs him, but realizes that they were still naked. "Uhm, can we ask you for some clothes?" She covers herself.

"To be honest with you, the fundings for our projects are low, so we don't own many clothes." The blonde woman says. "That's why we are pretty much full time nudists at this point."

"Still, we can give you a ride back home." Her husband replies. "Who's next?"

"That would be Mr. Quackers." Lucy puts him down and gets away.

"Okay?" He shoots him, too. And so the platypus gets confused yet again.

"I'll take care of him." Henry picks him up.

"And I guess we all know who's going next." Lucy crosses her arms, wondering if all the other models will get used to her being small.

"You're right." Lillian pushes her.

"What!?" She reacts. "Wait a second, time out." She asks Zach to not shoot yet. "What do you think you are doing?" Lucy faces her older sister.

"Making the right choice."

"No, no, I can't accept this."

"Don't be so selfish, Lucy." Lillian comments. "Mary is willing to stay like that if you are there for her and Mr. Quackers is going to need his owner at a normal size to feed him."

"And what about you? Hannah and Henry are your children."

"And who says I won't be able to feed or take care of them? Besides, I think I can be a little nudist now."

"Lillian, don't do this, please. I don't want to be the one that took your height."

"Uhm." Lillian pretends to think about it. "Then it's decided, now, I can justify that I have a problem with you." She giggles. But Lucy hugs her.

"This won't excuse you for not visiting me, though."

"You can drive, Lucy."

After this discussion, Lillian was the last one to grow back as the shrink ray stops working, once it for all.....

1532112112212211121111121112222122222121.content:
It's been a few months since 'The Incident" as the family calls it, and Henry and Hannah have settled in to their aunt Lucy's apartment comfortably, going to a higher end private school and doing fairly well. They had to get used to having a shrunken mother now, not to mention Mary crawling around everywhere, she was practically a talking dog the way Lucy treated her, not that she was complaint about all the attention....

Lillian had to quit her job of course, the world would freak out if shrinking technology was revealed, so she lived in a lego house that Henry built for her on the counter with various amenities and necessities of life. Aside from her loss of employment and height, she actually got closer to her sister (and her kid at aftre that whole mess they went through).

Mary also lost her job, but now was a full-time girlfriend to Lucy, who enjoyed bathing with her and petting her as they'd lay on the floor together, despite the back pain from her massive breasts, she felt like this was a step up from being the maid. Henryand Hannah took care of the cleaning now, trying to help out.

And Lucy? She was the face of the book that the family had written about their adventure, and enjoyed modeling for the cover, even though she felt a little bad about taking all the credit. But it was a necessity, the kids were minors, and legally, Mary and Lillian were deceased since they couldn't do anything anymore without becoming a science experiment.

All in all, the family found themselves closer, a little bit wealthier and an appreciation for their height, well, the ones who'd been restored to their original size.

Oh! Can't forget Mr. Quackers! The lucky platypus was given a trip to Australia to a platypus sanctuary for mating season, (much to Lucy's shock, platypuses weren't from Austria, but Australia). And he ended up with a few dozen eggs with his genes, let's just say when he returned, he was pretty laid back.

The end

info.brief_description: A girl of your choosing gets her hands on a shrink ray. What might come of this.

A shrink ray shows up inside the hands of whoever is picked in the story line. That can be someone you know IRL, a celebrity, a youtuber, who knows! The list goes on. They get this shrink ray and do what ever they please with it. Either they’re mischievous or they use it for good! The story is up to you.

You are more then welcome to add yourself in any of the story lines. This doesn’t have to be about only random people getting shrunk. Feel free to add in your persona!

No male interaction other then people shrunk. So no giant male characters.

Keep scat to a minimum. It’s ok to add just don’t go inhuman about it.

Everything else is a go! Let your imagination go wild in a way I guess!
